capability_needs.summary: Private GitHub gather through an authenticated provider path.
capability_needs.when: when gather needs private GitHub repository or PR access

capability_needs.summary: Private Slack thread gather through the charness-owned Slack runtime.
capability_needs.when: when gather needs private Slack thread access

capability_needs.summary: Private Google Workspace gather through an authenticated provider path.
capability_needs.when: when gather needs private Docs, Drive, Sheets, or Slides access

notes: Public gather paths such as published Notion or generic web fetch do not require a private capability binding.
